intitule: Exercise 1: Match the Word to the Definition

enonce.texte: Instructions: Match each word to its correct definition. (Relie chaque mot à sa définition correcte.)

questions.texte: The legal union of two people.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct word from the box. (Complète les phrases avec le mot correct de la boîte.)

Word box: husband, wife, marriage, wedding, spouse, marriage certificate.

questions.texte: The celebration of a marriage is called a ______.
The legal document that proves you are married is a ______.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read the marriage certificate and answer the questions below. (Lis l'acte de mariage et réponds aux questions ci-dessous.)

Marriage Certificate

  • Name of Husband: Jean Pierre
  • Name of Wife: Marie Claire
  • Date of Marriage: June 15, 2020
  • Place of Marriage: Douala, Cameroon
  • Witnesses: Paul and Amina
images: A simple marriage certificate with fields for names, date, place, and witnesses.

intitule: Exercise 4: Fill in the Marriage Certificate

enonce.texte: Instructions: Fill in the marriage certificate with your own information (or imaginary information). (Remplis l'acte de mariage avec tes propres informations ou des informations imaginaires.)

questions.texte: Write the name of the husband.
Write the name of the wife.
Write the date of the marriage.
Write the place of the marriage.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence. (Choisis le mot correct pour compléter chaque phrase.)

questions.texte: The ______ was beautiful. The bride wore a white dress.
They signed the ______ after the ceremony.

intitule: Exercise 6: Read and Answer - Family Story

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read the story and answer the questions. (Lis l'histoire et réponds aux questions.)

My Family's Story

My parents got married in 2010. My father's name is Paul, and my mother's name is Marie. Their wedding was in Bamenda. Many people came to the wedding. After the wedding, they went to live in Yaoundé. They have three children. Their marriage certificate is in a safe place at home.
images: A picture of a wedding ceremony with a bride and groom.

questions.texte: When did the parents get married?
How many children do they have?

questions.reponse: It is in a safe place at home.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Look at the family tree and answer the questions. (Regarde l'arbre généalogique et réponds aux questions.)

Family Tree:

  • Generation 1: David (husband) + Sarah (wife)
  • Children: John, Mary, Peter
  • Generation 2 (Marriages): John (husband) + Anna (wife), Mary (wife) + James (husband)
  • Children: John and Anna have two children: Mark and Lisa.
images: A family tree showing two generations with marriage connections.

questions.texte: How many children do John and Anna have?

enonce.texte: Instructions: Write a short paragraph (5-6 sentences) about a wedding you attended or imagine a wedding. Use the vocabulary from the lesson. (Écris un court paragraphe (5-6 phrases) sur un mariage auquel tu as assisté ou imagine un mariage. Utilise le vocabulaire de la leçon.)

questions.texte: Describe a wedding in 5-6 sentences. Mention the couple, the place, the date, and some activities.
questions.reponse: I attended my uncle's wedding last year. The wedding was in Douala. My uncle Jean married his wife Marie. The ceremony was in the church. After the wedding, there was a big party with music and food. Everyone was very happy.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Complete the dialogue with the correct words. (Complète le dialogue avec les mots corrects.)

Dialogue:

Person A: 'Are you married?'

Person B: 'Yes, I am. My ______ is a doctor.'

Person A: 'When was your ______?'

Person B: 'Our ______ was in 2018. We have a ______ certificate.'
Instructions: Read the statements and decide if they are True (T) or False (F). (Lis les affirmations et décide si elles sont Vraies (V) ou Fausses (F).)

questions.texte: A marriage certificate proves that two people are married.
A wife is a man in a marriage.
A wedding is the celebration of a marriage.
A spouse is a person who is not married.
